title: Snes' Backpacks
description: New backpacks with 4 tiers. Leather, copper, iron and diamond. Also adds a new item called a pouch that has a leather and copper tier aswell.
body: This mod adds 6 new items those including the Backpack, Copper Backpack, Iron Backpack, Diamond Backpack, Pouch and the Copper Pouch. the backpack and pouch are early game alternitives to shulker boxes plus you dont have to place them to use them the diamond backpack is bigger than a double chest! By one row... yeah. anyway hope you enjoy this mod if you need suport go to the support channel in the discord https://discord.gg/NY2tbPMX
